meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn how to implement high-conversion user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to drive revenue and user retention.
content.answer_block: Project stagnation stems from a lack of user momentum. By implementing a frictionless, value-first onboarding flow, you guide users to their 'Aha!' moment instantly. Use Antigravity to scaffold the UI and Claude Code to refine the logic, ensuring your MVP delivers immediate perceived value, driving higher retention and recurring revenue.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks architecting the perfect SaaS, yet your analytics dashboard is a graveyard of abandoned sessions. The code is clean, the features are robust, but your users are bouncing before they even touch the core value proposition. You aren't failing because your product is bad; you're failing because you haven't mastered the art of the first impression.

User onboarding isn't just a UI walkthrough—it is the bridge between a curious visitor and a paying subscriber. In this guide, we strip away the bloat and focus on a lean, high-velocity onboarding implementation that forces user success. We’ll leverage modern AI tools to ship this in hours, not weeks.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single action that delivers value. If the user doesn't reach this within 60 seconds, they churn. We define this clearly before touching a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my SaaS business model and suggest a 3-step 'Aha!' sequence that drives users to the core value proposition instantly. Keep it frictionless.
steps.claude_code_command: claude create --task 'Generate a user journey map for the onboarding flow focusing on the core value proposition.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding UI
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a clean, modular onboarding component library that integrates seamlessly with your existing stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive, accessible onboarding modal component in React/Tailwind that tracks progress and includes a progress bar and skip functionality.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/components/OnboardingModal.tsx --content 'Use the generated Antigravity component code'

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Ensure onboarding progress is persistent. If a user drops off, they should pick up exactly where they left off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom hook in React to manage onboarding state in local storage, ensuring the user is redirected to the correct step upon return.
steps.claude_code_command: claude refactor --file src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts --logic 'Add persistence to local storage'

steps.title: Integrate Behavioral Analytics
steps.description: You can't optimize what you don't measure. Add event tracking to every step of your onboarding to identify friction points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an event tracking utility for onboarding steps that pushes data to PostHog or Mixpanel automatically.

steps.title: Final Logic Integration
steps.description: Connect the onboarding flow to your backend authentication and profile setup to ensure a seamless transition to the app dashboard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the integration between the onboarding flow and the user profile database schema. Ensure no data gaps exist.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --test 'Verify end-to-end onboarding flow from landing page to dashboard'

pro_tips: Never ask for account creation before showing value; allow 'guest mode' exploration first.
Use a progress bar that is never at 0%; start at 10% to create an endowment effect.
Automate email triggers based on the specific onboarding step where a user dropped off.
Keep copy conversational; write like a human, not a technical manual.
A/B test the 'Aha!' moment trigger every 14 days to optimize conversion rates.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, monitor your conversion funnel for 7 days, identify the step with the highest drop-off rate, and iterate on the UI copy.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your hard work go to waste by losing users at the front door. Implement this strategy today to turn your MVP into a revenue-generating machine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
